svg.title: MemoX wordmark — light usage
svg.desc: MemoX typographic wordmark set in Plus Jakarta Sans Extrabold, deep-violet #4b3a8c, for use on light surfaces (#f6f5fc / #ffffff).

text.font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
